studies.title: Digital Treatment of Back Pain versus Standard of Care: The Cluster-Randomized Controlled Trial, Rise-uP
studies.abstract: Authors Priebe JA, Haas KK, Moreno Sanchez LF, Schoeffmann K, Utpadel-Fischler DA, Stockert P, Thoma R, Schiessl C.
studies.brief_summary: Authors Priebe JA, Haas KK, Moreno Sanchez LF, Schoeffmann K, Utpadel-Fischler DA, Stockert P, Thoma R, Schiessl C.

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the 'Kaia App' as part of the Rise-uP trial intervention for back pain, which matches the digital therapeutic product 'Kaia Rückenschmerzen - Rückentraining für Zuhause'.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 0 RWE indicators.
